# V2 retention read

## TL;DR

V2 comfortably met the success threshold on signup_completed (+6.4pp).

The arm clearly outperformed control on the primary metric, and the
effect is decisively above the pre-registered threshold of +5pp.

## Body

There are minor caveats but the headline holds up.
